operationLog.dialog.title: Operation log

@operationLog.dialog.title.description: Title of the Operation log dialog, which lists recent file operations (copy, move, delete, rename). Sentence case.

@operationLog.dialog.loading.description: Shown while the Operation log dialog loads the list of operations, or while one operation's items load.

operationLog.dialog.loadError: Couldn’t load your operation history. Try again in a moment.

@operationLog.dialog.loadError.description: Shown in the Operation log dialog when the history couldn't be read. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

operationLog.dialog.empty: No operations yet. Copy, move, rename, or delete something and it’ll show up here.

@operationLog.dialog.empty.description: Empty state in the Operation log dialog when nothing has been logged yet. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

@operationLog.dialog.itemsError.description: Shown when the per-item detail of one expanded operation couldn't be read. Avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

operationLog.dialog.noItems: This operation has no recorded items.

@operationLog.dialog.noItems.description: Shown when an expanded operation has no per-item rows recorded.

operationLog.dialog.moreItems: {count, plural, one {and {countText} more item} other {and {countText} more items}}

@operationLog.dialog.moreItems.description: Shown below an expanded operation's item list when more items exist than are displayed. count is the number of extra items; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder.

@operationLog.dialog.loadMore.description: Button that loads the next 50 operations into the Operation log dialog.

@operationLog.dialog.close.description: Button that closes the Operation log dialog.

@operationLog.summary.copy.description: One-line summary of a copy operation. count is the number of items copied; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.move.description: One-line summary of a move operation. count is the number of items moved; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.delete.description: One-line summary of a permanent-delete operation. count is the number of items deleted; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

operationLog.summary.trash: {count, plural, one {Moved {countText} item to the trash} other {Moved {countText} items to the trash}}

@operationLog.summary.trash.description: One-line summary of a trash operation (moving items to the system trash/recycle bin). count is the number of items; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.rename.description: One-line summary of a rename operation (one item, or a batch rename of many). count is the number of items renamed; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.createFolder.description: One-line summary of a create-folder operation. count is the number of folders created; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.createFile.description: One-line summary of a create-file operation. count is the number of files created; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.compress.description: One-line summary of a compress operation (creating an archive). count is the number of items compressed; countText is that number formatted with the locale's thousands separator. Keep the {countText} placeholder in every plural branch.

@operationLog.summary.archiveEdit.description: One-line summary of editing the contents of an existing archive (adding to or changing files inside a zip).

@operationLog.summary.archiveExtract.description: One-line summary of extracting an archive's contents.

@operationLog.initiator.user.description: Shown on an operation the user started themselves (as opposed to an AI client). Provenance label.

@operationLog.initiator.aiClient.description: Shown on an operation an external AI client started over Cmdr's automation interface. Provenance label.

@operationLog.initiator.agent.description: Shown on an operation Cmdr's own AI agent started. Provenance label.

@operationLog.status.queued.description: Lifecycle status of an operation that is waiting to run.

@operationLog.status.running.description: Lifecycle status of an operation that is currently running.

@operationLog.status.done.description: Lifecycle status of an operation that finished successfully.

@operationLog.status.failed.description: Lifecycle status of an operation that stopped before completing. Avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

@operationLog.status.canceled.description: Lifecycle status of an operation the user canceled.

@operationLog.rollback.notRollbackable.description: Rollback status: this operation can't be reversed (for example a permanent delete). The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

@operationLog.rollback.rollbackable.description: Rollback status: this operation can be reversed.

@operationLog.rollback.rollingBack.description: Rollback status: a reversal of this operation is currently in progress.

@operationLog.rollback.rolledBack.description: Rollback status: this operation has been fully reversed.

@operationLog.rollback.partiallyRolledBa.description: Rollback status: some but not all of this operation was reversed.

@operationLog.outcome.done.description: Per-item outcome shown in an expanded operation: the item was handled successfully.

@operationLog.outcome.skipped.description: Per-item outcome shown in an expanded operation: the item was skipped.

@operationLog.outcome.failed.description: Per-item outcome shown in an expanded operation: the item didn't complete. Avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

@operationLog.outcome.rolledBack.description: Per-item outcome shown in an expanded operation: the item was reversed by a rollback.
